import * as core from "../core/index.js"; import * as schemas from "./schemas.js"; export function string(params) { return core._coercedString(schemas.ZodString, params); } export function number(params) { return core._coercedNumber(schemas.ZodNumber, params); } export function boolean(params) { return core._coercedBoolean(schemas.ZodBoolean, params); } export function bigint(params) { return core._coercedBigint(schemas.ZodBigInt, params); } export function date(params) { return core._coercedDate(schemas.ZodDate, params); }
